description:
Half-Life Advanced Effects (HLAE) is a tool to enrich Source (mainly CS:GO) engine based movie making.


- Included AfxHookGoldSrc 2.25.2 (2026-04-20T23:50Z)
- Included AfxHookSource2 0.38.8 (2026-04-20T23:50Z)
AfxHookGoldSrc 2.25.2 (2026-04-20T23:50Z)
- Fixed matte problems in dem_forcehltv 1
- steam_legacy branch is now supported again
AfxHookSource2 0.38.8 (2026-04-20T23:50Z)
- Adjusted to CS2 update (1.41.5.1)
- Fixed minor bug in mirv_deathmsg
- mirv-script: fixed mirv.onRecordStart, mirv.onRecordEnd types declaration
